description.unified: Increases ATK by [20%->15%] and ACC by [400->120].
Increases all allies’ DEF Penetration by [150->60] and ACC by [75->60]. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [50->30] DEF Penetration and [25->30] ACC apply.
On Critical Hit, reduces the enemy’s Recovery by [50%->24%] for 10 sec and deals Physical DoT equal to 20% of ATK every sec. Does not stack with the same effect from other allies.
Increases Crit Chance by [150->185] and Crit DMG by [30%->24%].
Every 5 sec, increases own Crit DMG by [4%->3%]. Stacks up to [25->24] times and cannot be removed.
Increases ATK by [20%->15%] and DEF Penetration by [200->120].
All Dodge +[100->50] per second, up to [5->10] stacks; resets upon a successful dodge.
Increases All Dodge by [200->80] and reduces DMG taken by [10%->8%].
Increases Crit Chance by [150->185] and Crit DMG by [30%->24%].
On attack, causes the target to take [10%->8%] increased All DMG and reduces ATK Speed by [100->8%] for 10 sec. Activates once every 3 sec.
Attacked targets take [20%->16%] more DMG. Does not stack with the same effect from other allies.
Increases CC Accuracy of all allies by [150->100]. If another ally has the same Perk, only 50 additional CC Accuracy is applied.
Increases Max HP of all allies by [15%->10%]. If another ally has the same Perk, only 5% additional Max HP is applied.
Increases All Block by [200->150] and CC Resistance by [200->150].
Increases ATK Speed by [200->12%] and ACC by [400->120].
Increases ATK by [20%->15%] and DEF Penetration by [200->120].
Increases Mana Recovery per sec by [62.5% -> 10.8%] for each enemy.
Increases own Crit Chance by [400->350].
Attacked targets lose [15%->10%] ATK and [150->100] Crit Chance. Does not stack with effects from other allies.
Increases all allies’ Crit DMG by [30%->12%]. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [10%->4%] applies.
Increases all allies’ Crit Chance by [150->90]. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [50->45] applies.
All allies recover 1% HP per sec and gain [75->60] CC Resist. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [0.3%->0.5%] HP recovery per sec and [25->30] CC Resist apply.
Increases Mana Recovery per sec by [250%->30%].
Increases all allies’ ATK Speed by [150->60]. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [50->30] applies.
Increases Crit Chance by [150->185] and Crit DMG by [30%->24%].
Increases ATK by [7%->6%] and CC Resistance by 30 per enemy. Stacks up to [10->5] times.
ATK increases by [half of P.DEF->25% of P.DEF]. P.DMG taken is reduced by 15%.
ncreases All Dodge by [200->80] and reduces DMG taken by [10%->8%].
Increases Lifesteal by [200->60] and ATK Speed by [200->12%].
Increases all allies’ ATK by [15%->7%]. If another ally has the same perk, only an additional [3%->3.5%] ATK applies.
Increases Mana Recovery per sec by [250%->30%].
DMG Taken is increased by 15%, but ATK is increased by [40%->35%] and ACC by [200->150].
Increases Crit Chance by [200->185] and DEF Penetration by [200->120].
